# Video: 00:00.733 => 00:43.233
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.680
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

00:24.040 --> 00:29.120
<Speaker 3>What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

00:29.600 --> 00:32.880
<Speaker 3>And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

00:33.680 --> 00:37.200
<Speaker 4>Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

00:38.680 --> 00:41.280
<Speaker 4>9555 request to end pushback received.
```

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a scenic aerial view of an island and displays the Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI logos. It then transitions to a discussion about neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology, emphasizing the importance of high-quality data. The narration explains the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural-sounding voices. Visuals include waveform animations representing audio data and shots of a data center and server infrastructure. The segment concludes with a demonstration of the TTS technology in use, featuring an airplane on a runway and ground crew communication, highlighting the high fidelity and human-like quality of the synthesized voice.

transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 3

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 3
transcriptPhrases.text: And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

transcriptPhrases.text: Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

Summary.valueString: The segment shifts to showcasing the application of the TTS technology within a flight simulation context. It features dynamic aerial shots of a biplane flying over diverse landscapes, including coastal areas and a castle, demonstrating the realistic graphics of the flight simulator. The narration praises the cognitive services for their high fidelity and human-like voice quality. The scene then transitions to an airport setting with ground crew directing an Airbus airplane, accompanied by realistic radio communication exchanges between the ground crew and pilots, illustrating the integration of natural-sounding TTS in aviation scenarios.
